items.name: voyant-bookings-booking-dialog
items.title: Booking Dialog
items.description: Modal wrapper around the core booking create/edit form.

items.name: voyant-bookings-booking-list
items.title: Booking List
items.description: Searchable booking table with create/edit dialog and operator quick-book CTA.

items.name: voyant-bookings-booking-group-link-dialog
items.title: Booking Group Link Dialog
items.description: Link a booking to a shared-room group — either create a new group or join an existing one.

items.name: voyant-bookings-booking-group-section
items.title: Booking Group Section
items.description: Shared-room group section for the booking detail: shows sibling bookings, link/unlink actions.

items.name: voyant-bookings-product-picker-section
items.title: Booking Product Picker Section
items.description: Controlled product + option picker for booking-create flows. Cascades option list from the selected product; accepts a pre-locked productId for product-page entry points.

items.name: voyant-bookings-person-picker-section
items.title: Booking Person Picker Section
items.description: Controlled person picker with inline-create and optional organization attachment. Parent owns the create-person mutation so the dialog can defer it to submit time.

items.name: voyant-bookings-shared-room-section
items.title: Booking Shared-Room Section
items.description: Partaj (shared-room) section for booking create: toggle + create/join mode + group selector. Parent owns the booking_groups mutations (they fire after booking insert).

items.name: voyant-bookings-payment-schedule-section
items.title: Booking Payment Schedule Section
items.description: Operator payment schedule picker: unpaid / full / advance / split (two installments with a 50-50 preset). Produces a controlled PaymentScheduleValue; parent creates booking_payment_schedules rows at submit time.

items.name: voyant-bookings-passengers-section
items.title: Booking Passengers Section
items.description: Multi-row passenger list for booking-create: name + email + role (lead / adult / child / infant) + optional room assignment, with add/remove. Parent creates CRM people + booking_travelers rows at submit time.

items.name: voyant-bookings-rooms-stepper-section
items.title: Booking Rooms Stepper Section
items.description: Per-option-unit quantity stepper for booking-create, driven by GET /v1/availability/slots/:id/unit-availability. Shows live 'N left' counters; min/max enforced against the server's remaining count so the UI can't queue up a 409.

items.name: voyant-bookings-price-breakdown-section
items.title: Booking Price Breakdown Section
items.description: Read-only live price breakdown for booking-create flows. Reads the catalog-resolved pricing snapshot via usePricingPreview and computes per-unit tiered lines + total against the operator's current unit quantities — same math the storefront runs.

items.name: voyant-bookings-quick-book-dialog
items.title: Quick Book Dialog
items.description: Operator quick-book workflow composing every booking-create section (product, departure, rooms, person, shared-room, passengers, price breakdown, voucher, payment schedule) and submitting atomically via POST /v1/bookings/quick-create. Apps that need a custom flow can install the sections individually and assemble their own dialog.

items.name: voyant-bookings-voucher-picker-section
items.title: Booking Voucher Picker Section
items.description: Operator voucher picker: enter a code, validate against POST /v1/public/vouchers/validate (status / expiry / currency / booking-assignment / balance guards apply). Returns the picked voucher on success; parent redeems at submit time when the final amount is known.

items.name: voyant-bookings-traveler-dialog

items.description: Create/edit traveler dialog wired to bookings-react traveler mutations.

items.description: Traveler section for a booking detail page, including create, edit, and delete actions.

items.name: voyant-legal-booking-contract-card
items.title: Booking Contract Card
items.description: Operator booking-detail card that lists the contracts linked to a booking, shows each contract's status + number, lets the operator download the generated PDF (opens in a new tab), and offers a Regenerate action that forces a fresh render via POST /contracts/:id/regenerate-document.

items.name: voyant-currency-combobox
items.title: Currency Combobox
items.description: Searchable currency picker backed by the canonical `currencies` list from @voyantjs/utils. Trigger shows `CODE (symbol)`; items show `CODE — Name (symbol)`.

items.name: voyant-date-time-picker
items.title: Date & Time Picker
items.description: Combined date + time picker. Calendar in a popover with an `HH:mm` time input beneath it. Value is serialized as `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm` so it's a drop-in replacement for native `<input type="datetime-local">`.
